sprint_name: TechShop SEO Tech Sprint — Q1 Demo

tasks.definition: Reduce LCP below 2.5s by deferring non-critical JS and optimizing image delivery.
tasks.latest_update:
JS deferral is complete. Image optimization is in review.

Next Steps: Merge image optimization PR and validate LCP score in staging.

tasks.definition: Auto-generate meta titles and descriptions for all category pages via CMS templating.
tasks.latest_update:
CMS template drafted and under review. 80% of category pages covered.

Next Steps: Cover remaining edge-case categories and deploy to staging.

tasks.definition: Add Organization + BreadcrumbList structured data to homepage and PDP pages.
tasks.latest_update:
Deployed to production. Validated via Google Rich Results Test.

Next Steps: Monitor Search Console for structured data errors over the next 7 days.

tasks.definition: Fix duplicate canonical URLs caused by URL slug variations; shift to 301 redirect logic.
tasks.latest_update:
Root cause identified: slug normalization inconsistency in the URL builder.

Next Steps: Alice and Bob to align on the fix approach in Thursday's session.
blockers: Waiting for URL builder owner to review proposed fix

tasks.definition: Dynamically inject high-impression Brand+Category URLs into page widgets to boost crawl equity.
tasks.latest_update: Not yet started. Scheduled to begin after Metadata Automation is merged.

tasks.definition: Resolve discrepancy where mobile endpoints receive different SEO data than desktop.
tasks.latest_update:
On hold pending higher-priority items. Will resume after canonicalization fix is shipped.

Next Steps: Reassess priority in next sprint planning.

tasks.definition: Remove deprecated crawl rules and add directives for new URL patterns.
tasks.latest_update:
Draft updated. Awaiting sign-off from SEO lead before deploy.

Next Steps: Get approval and schedule deploy for next sprint.

tasks.definition: Migrate legacy ?filters= URL patterns to clean /f/ slugs with 301 redirects and metadata preservation.
tasks.latest_update:
Blocked: waiting for platform team to confirm infrastructure support for new slug format.

Next Steps: Follow up with platform team by Apr 5.
